usage: read_power_rail_results [-help] [-cell_library <cell lib file>] [-custom_value_inst_file_1 <file>] [-data_type {rail all increment_power}] [-detail_delta_temperature_file <file>] [-effective_resistance_file <file>] [-enable_plots {names}] [-esd_directory <dir>] [-esd_rj <name>] [-force] [-instance_delta_temperature_file <file>] [-instance_voltage_method { best worst avg worstavg worstslidingavg bestslidingavg}] [-instance_voltage_window {timing whole}] [-instances {names}] [-nets {names}] [-power_directory <dir>] [-profiling_power_file <file>] [-reset] [-sem_db <file>] [-short_file <file>] [-suppress_message] [-thermal_file <file>] [-tile_delta_temperature_file <file>] [-tile_thermal_config_file <file>] [ -physical_db <dir> [-top_cell_name <name>]] [ -top_cell_name <name> [-physical_db <dir>]] [ -power_db <file> ] [ -rail_directory <dir> [-die_instance_name <name>]]

options.name: -cell_library
options.description: specify a cell library when load state directory

options.name: -detail_delta_temperature_file
options.description: Detail temperature file. Required for ddt plot

options.name: -effective_resistance_file
options.description: Effective Resistance file by analyze_resistance. Required for effr plot

options.name: -force
options.description: Force resetting rail and power directory

options.name: -instance_delta_temperature_file
options.description: Instance delta temperature file. Required for idt plot

options.name: -instance_voltage_method
options.description: { best worst avg worstavg worstslidingavg bestslidingavg} IV Method type : best worst avg worstavg worstslidingavg bestslidingavg.

options.name: -physical_db
options.description: hierarchy db directory. This option would trigger 'read_hier_design'

options.name: -power_db
options.description: power.db file generate by power calculator. If not specified, program will use power stored in memory.

options.name: -profiling_power_file
options.description: profiling_power_file (*.rpt.density) generated ty power calculator. Gui can use it to form ptpd plot

options.name: -rail_directory
options.description: load state directory. The state directory must have <net>.mhdr file

options.name: -reset
options.description: Free the rail and power directory

options.name: -tile_delta_temperature_file
options.description: Tile delta temperature file. Required for tdt plot

options.name: -tile_thermal_config_file
options.description: Thermal file. Required for tile_thermal plot

options.name: -top_cell_name
options.description: top cell name. This option would trigger 'read_hier_design, need to group with -physical_db.
